questionText: Você está em um restaurante e quer pedir água. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could I have a glass of water, please?
options: Could I have a glass of water, please?

questionText: Como você pede desculpas por chegar tarde para um almoço de negócios?
correctAnswer: I'm sorry I'm late. Traffic was terrible.
options: I'm sorry I'm late. Traffic was terrible.

questionText: Um amigo oferece você um prato especial. Como você responde positivamente?
correctAnswer: That looks delicious! I'd love to try it.
options: That looks delicious! I'd love to try it.

questionText: Como você pergunta se um prato contém amendoim quando tem alergia?
correctAnswer: Does this dish contain peanuts? I'm allergic.
options: Does this dish contain peanuts? I'm allergic.

questionText: O garçom traz o prato errado. Como você avisa educadamente?
correctAnswer: Excuse me, I think there's been a mistake. I ordered the pasta.
options: Excuse me, I think there's been a mistake. I ordered the pasta.

questionText: Como você oferece comida a um convidado que ainda não provou nada?
correctAnswer: Have you tried the appetizers yet? They're really good.
options: Have you tried the appetizers yet? They're really good.

questionText: Você quer saber a opinião de alguém sobre a comida. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: What do you think of the meal?
options: What do you think of the meal?
The meal is good for you

questionText: Como você recusa politely um prato que não gosta?
correctAnswer: Thank you, but I'm not really a fan of mushrooms.
options: Thank you, but I'm not really a fan of mushrooms.

questionText: Você quer chamar atenção do garçom. Como você faz?
correctAnswer: Excuse me, could I get the bill, please?
options: Excuse me, could I get the bill, please?

questionText: Como você complimenta o chef sobre a comida?
correctAnswer: The meal was absolutely delicious. My compliments to the chef!
options: The meal was absolutely delicious. My compliments to the chef!

questionText: Você quer sugerir um restaurante a um amigo. Como você faz?
correctAnswer: I know a great Italian restaurant. Would you like to try it?
options: I know a great Italian restaurant. Would you like to try it?

questionText: Como você desculpa por colocar sal demais na comida?
correctAnswer: I'm sorry, I may have added too much salt. Let me make it again.
options: I'm sorry, I may have added too much salt. Let me make it again.

questionText: Alguém quer saber se você é vegetariano. Como você responde que sim?
correctAnswer: Yes, I'm vegetarian, so I don't eat meat.
options: Yes, I'm vegetarian, so I don't eat meat.

questionText: Como você pergunta se a comida está quente?
correctAnswer: Is your food hot enough?

questionText: Você quer pedir mais pão na mesa. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could we have some more bread, please?
options: Could we have some more bread, please?

questionText: Como você se oferece para pagar a conta quando está com amigos?
correctAnswer: Let me get this. It's my treat!
options: Let me get this. It's my treat!

questionText: Você precisa informar uma restrição alimentar mais complexa. Como você faz?
correctAnswer: I'm on a low-sodium diet, so could I have less salt in my food, please?
options: I'm on a low-sodium diet, so could I have less salt in my food, please?

questionText: Como você descreve o sabor de um prato que comeu recentemente?
correctAnswer: The fish was tender and had a subtle lemon flavor.
options: The fish was tender and had a subtle lemon flavor.

questionText: Você quer perguntar sobre os ingredientes de um prato ao garçom.
correctAnswer: Could you tell me what ingredients are in this dish?
options: Could you tell me what ingredients are in this dish?

questionText: Como você declina um convite para comer sem ser rude?
correctAnswer: Thanks for the invitation, but I've already eaten. Maybe next time!
options: Thanks for the invitation, but I've already eaten. Maybe next time!

questionText: Você quer saber recomendações do restaurante. O que você pergunta?
correctAnswer: What would you recommend? What are your house specialties?
options: What would you recommend? What are your house specialties?

questionText: Como você expressa que a comida veio muito salgada?
correctAnswer: I think this is a bit too salty. Could we adjust it?
options: I think this is a bit too salty. Could we adjust it?

questionText: Você quer perguntar sobre as porções. Como você faz?
correctAnswer: Are the portions usually quite large here?
options: Are the portions usually quite large here?

questionText: Como você pede para compartilhar um prato com alguém?
correctAnswer: Would you like to share a dessert with me?
options: Would you like to share a dessert with me?

questionText: Você quer informar que é intolerante à lactose. Como você diz?
correctAnswer: I'm lactose intolerant. Do you have any dairy-free options?
options: I'm lactose intolerant. Do you have any dairy-free options?

questionText: Como você pergunta se um restaurante aceita reservas?
correctAnswer: Do you take reservations, or is it first come, first served?
options: Do you take reservations, or is it first come, first served?
How do I book a table?

questionText: Você quer informar que prefere comida mais leve. Como você expressa?
correctAnswer: I prefer lighter meals. Do you have any salads or fish options?
options: I prefer lighter meals. Do you have any salads or fish options?

questionText: Como você agradece alguém que preparou uma refeição deliciosa?
correctAnswer: Thank you so much. That was absolutely wonderful!
options: Thank you so much. That was absolutely wonderful!

questionText: Você quer perguntar o tempo de espera para um prato. O que diz?
correctAnswer: How long will it take for the main course to arrive?
options: How long will it take for the main course to arrive?

questionText: Você precisa informar que é celíaco. Como você explica?
correctAnswer: I'm celiac, so I need to avoid gluten. Can you suggest something suitable?
options: I'm celiac, so I need to avoid gluten. Can you suggest something suitable?

questionText: Como você sugere uma mudança de local para comer sem ofender seu anfitrião?
correctAnswer: I appreciate this place, but would you mind if we tried that new restaurant down the street?
options: I appreciate this place, but would you mind if we tried that new restaurant down the street?

questionText: Você quer perguntar sobre métodos de preparo de um prato mais complexo.
correctAnswer: Is this dish steamed or sautéed? I'm trying to eat healthier.
options: Is this dish steamed or sautéed? I'm trying to eat healthier.

questionText: Como você pede desculpas por cancelar um jantar planejado?
correctAnswer: I'm terribly sorry, but I need to reschedule our dinner. Something came up unexpectedly.
options: I'm terribly sorry, but I need to reschedule our dinner. Something came up unexpectedly.

questionText: Você quer elogiar o ambiente e serviço do restaurante, não apenas a comida.
correctAnswer: The ambiance is lovely, and the service has been impeccable. We'll definitely return.
options: The ambiance is lovely, and the service has been impeccable. We'll definitely return.

questionText: Como você expressa uma reclamação sobre comida muito cara de forma educada?
correctAnswer: The meal was excellent, but I felt the price was a bit steep for the portion size.
options: The meal was excellent, but I felt the price was a bit steep for the portion size.

questionText: Você quer pedir um prato personalizado com modificações. Como você faz?
correctAnswer: Could I have the pasta, but with the sauce on the side and extra vegetables instead?
options: Could I have the pasta, but with the sauce on the side and extra vegetables instead?
I don't like this dish as is

questionText: Como você pergunta sobre opções de vinho que combinem com a comida?
correctAnswer: Could you recommend a wine that pairs well with this fish dish?
options: Could you recommend a wine that pairs well with this fish dish?

questionText: Você quer informar uma restrição cultural religiosa de forma clara.
correctAnswer: For religious reasons, I follow halal practices. Do you prepare your meat accordingly?
options: For religious reasons, I follow halal practices. Do you prepare your meat accordingly?

questionText: Como você sugere ir a um restaurante a um colega de trabalho de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: I know an excellent restaurant near the office. Would you be interested in having lunch there next week?
options: I know an excellent restaurant near the office. Would you be interested in having lunch there next week?

questionText: Você quer desculpar-se por pedir muitas modificações no prato.
correctAnswer: I apologize for all these modifications. I have several dietary preferences, but I appreciate your flexibility.
options: I apologize for all these modifications. I have several dietary preferences, but I appreciate your flexibility.

questionText: Como você pergunta sobre a disponibilidade de alimentos orgânicos ou locais?
correctAnswer: Do you source your ingredients locally? Are any of your dishes organic?
options: Do you source your ingredients locally? Are any of your dishes organic?

questionText: Você quer avisar sobre uma possível contaminação cruzada em sua comida.
correctAnswer: I have a severe peanut allergy, so please ensure there's no cross-contamination when preparing my meal.
options: I have a severe peanut allergy, so please ensure there's no cross-contamination when preparing my meal.

questionText: Como você expressa interesse em aprender sobre a cozinha local?
correctAnswer: I'm really interested in regional cuisine. Can you tell me about the traditional dishes here?
options: I'm really interested in regional cuisine. Can you tell me about the traditional dishes here?

questionText: Você quer reclamar educadamente sobre o tempo de espera muito longo.
correctAnswer: I appreciate your work, but we've been waiting quite a while. Could you check on our order?
options: I appreciate your work, but we've been waiting quite a while. Could you check on our order?

questionText: Como você oferece introduzir alguém a um tipo de culinária que eles nunca experimentaram?
correctAnswer: You've never tried Thai food before? I'd love to introduce you to it. It's quite different but delicious.
options: You've never tried Thai food before? I'd love to introduce you to it. It's quite different but delicious.

questionText: Você quer informar que prefere comida mais bem temperada. Como você diz?
correctAnswer: I generally prefer dishes with more spice and flavor. Could you recommend something with a bit of heat?
options: I generally prefer dishes with more spice and flavor. Could you recommend something with a bit of heat?
